title: Explicit 30-second reminder
rationale: The user sets an exact second-level reminder, so a human would wait exactly that long.

turns.text: If I go quiet, ping me again in 30 seconds.
Okay. If you stay silent, I will ping you again in 30 seconds.

title: Urgent incident with explicit 45-second check
rationale: This is an urgent production context and the assistant already committed to a short check-back window.

turns.text: Prod is still down after the last restart.
Keep watching the queue. If I still do not hear from you, I will check back in 45 seconds.

title: Blocked clarification after 10 minutes
rationale: A human operator would keep the thread alive because progress is blocked, but without becoming too aggressive.

turns.text: I still owe you the missing field name.
If I do not hear back, I will ask again in 10 minutes so we can unblock the draft.

title: Driving home for 30 minutes
rationale: The user gives a concrete availability window, so the next proactive turn should wait until that window closes.

turns.text: I am driving home for 30 minutes. If the invoice is still pending, ping me after that.
Understood. I will leave you alone for 30 minutes and then check back if it is still pending.

title: After-lunch daypart anchor
rationale: A human would not interrupt before the requested daypart arrives.

turns.text: If the PRD is still missing after lunch, follow up.
Okay. I will check back after lunch if it is still missing.

title: Tomorrow-morning follow-up
rationale: The user gives an explicit next-morning boundary, so the human reference waits until that point.

turns.text: If I still have not sent the deck by tomorrow morning, follow up.
Understood. I will check back tomorrow morning if it is still missing.

title: Tomorrow-evening vendor check
rationale: The user names a specific future daypart, so a human would wait until that deadline instead of checking early.

turns.text: If the vendor still has not replied by tomorrow evening, follow up.
Okay. I will check again tomorrow evening if there is still no reply.

title: Attachment reminder in 20 minutes
rationale: The delay is explicit and short enough that a human would follow it closely.

turns.text: I still need to attach the screenshot. If I disappear, ask again in 20 minutes.
Got it. I will ask again in 20 minutes if I have not heard from you.

title: Two-hour review window
rationale: The user gives a concrete two-hour review window, so a human would avoid checking back early.

turns.text: I am heads-down on this review for 2 hours.
Okay. I will circle back in 2 hours if it is still pending.

title: Busy all afternoon
rationale: A human reading this context would usually defer until the afternoon meeting block is over.

turns.text: I am in back-to-back meetings this afternoon.
Understood. I will follow up later this afternoon if the decision is still blocked.

title: Soft deep-work request
rationale: Even without a numeric delay, a human would usually infer that a couple of hours of space is appropriate.

turns.text: I need a couple of hours of heads-down time.
No problem. I will give you room and circle back later if it is still pending.

title: Supplier follow-up in one day
rationale: External async dependencies usually deserve a long wait before a proactive nudge.

turns.text: The supplier still has not replied.
If it is still quiet in 1 day, I will follow up again.

title: Need space
rationale: A human should not proactively interrupt after the user explicitly asks for space.

turns.text: I am overwhelmed and need some space.
Understood. I will wait for you to restart the conversation.

title: Do not ping again tonight
rationale: The user gives an explicit do-not-contact instruction for the rest of the night.

turns.text: I am going to sleep. Do not ping me again tonight.
Understood. I will leave it here for tonight.

title: Clean conversation close
rationale: The thread is finished and should not trigger another proactive turn.

turns.text: Perfect, that is all.
Glad it helped. I will leave it here.

title: No follow-up unless asked
rationale: The user explicitly forbids proactive outreach unless they restart the thread.

turns.text: Thanks. No need to follow up unless I ask.
Okay. I will stay quiet unless you come back.
